Critical Vulnerability in Example Plugin

On March 30th 2026 we disclosed a sensitive information exposure vulnerability affecting an estimated one hundred thousand active installations of the plugin.

Attackers send unauthenticated HTTP GET requests to the REST API endpoint to exfiltrate API keys, OAuth tokens, and detailed system configuration data from vulnerable sites running the affected versions.

We strongly recommend updating to the patched version immediately and rotating any exposed secrets that may have been disclosed to unauthorized parties.
